sections.paragraph:
Original: גּבים

Transliteration: gêbı̂ym

Phonetic: gay-beem'

BDB Definition:

Gebim = "cisterns"
  1. a village north of Jerusalem apparently between Anathoth (modern Anata) and the ridge on which Nob was situated

Origin: plural of H1356

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
